headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $91
summary: UBS  analyst William Appicelli   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $89 to $91.

headline: Xcelerate Your Portfolio's Returns With Xcel Energy
